mapper.sql: CASE UPPER(CAST(q.status AS TEXT)) WHEN '1' THEN 'WAITING' WHEN 'WAITING' THEN 'WAITING' WHEN '2' THEN 'IN_PROGRESS' WHEN 'IN_PROGRESS' THEN 'IN_PROGRESS' WHEN '3' THEN 'CANCELLED' WHEN 'CANCELLED' THEN 'CANCELLED' WHEN '4' THEN 'FAILED' WHEN 'FAILED' THEN 'FAILED' ELSE NULL END

AND q.study_id IS NULL AND COALESCE(q.image_received_at, q.received_at) IS NULL AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM pacs_worklist_study_links active_qsl WHERE active_qsl.hospital_id = q.hospital_id AND active_qsl.worklist_id = q.id AND active_qsl.is_primary = 1 )

sql.if: AND CAST(COALESCE(q.created_at, q.created, NOW()) AS DATE) >= #{dateFrom}
AND CAST(COALESCE(q.created_at, q.created, NOW()) AS DATE) <= #{dateTo}
AND COALESCE(CAST(s.image_received_at AS DATE), CAST(s.received_at AS DATE), s.study_date, CAST(s.created AS DATE)) >= #{dateFrom}
AND COALESCE(CAST(s.image_received_at AS DATE), CAST(s.received_at AS DATE), s.study_date, CAST(s.created AS DATE)) <= #{dateTo}

mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM pacs_worklists q WHERE 1 = 1
AND q.hospital_id = #{hospitalId}

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(received_study_count), 0) FROM pacs_daily_stats WHERE 1 = 1
AND hospital_id = #{hospitalId}
